overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character moves from interior corridors adorned with hieroglyphics and painted columns, through transitional courtyards, and into a grand ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues and obelisks under a bright desert sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior temple corridor with reflecting pool

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple interior, passing between large painted columns and alongside a reflecting pool

notable_agents.action: temple worker walking alongside the pool in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: massive columns painted with blue and yellow lotus patterns on white base
stone walls covered in Egyptian hieroglyphics and colorful deity paintings
tall standing torch with burning flame on metal pedestal
greenish water pool running along the left side of the walkway
colorful flower petals scattered across the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an enclosed temple interior featuring massive painted lotus columns and walls covered in hieroglyphics. A reflecting pool runs along the left side while bronze braziers provide warm lighting. Flower petals are scattered across the marble floor, and a few NPCs walk through the sacred space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor leading to temple exit

events.description: character moves from fully enclosed interior to semi-covered transitional space with increasing natural light
lighting shifts from mixed artificial to predominantly natural sunlight as approaching exterior

agents.ego_description: walking toward the temple exit, passing through a corridor with hanging fabrics and decorative planters

entered.detail: large black and gold planters containing palm trees
white fabric banners hanging overhead providing partial shade
red and blue ornate rugs laid across the stone walkway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the enclosed temple interior toward the exit, moving through a semi-covered corridor. Large decorated planters and hanging linen canopies appear overhead, while patterned rugs cover the floor. The lighting gradually shifts from artificial torchlight to natural sunlight as the exterior approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with ceremonial decorations

events.description: exits the temple structure completely into an open courtyard with palm trees and bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking across the open courtyard scattered with flower petals, approaching the main ceremonial avenue

notable_agents.action: group of temple workers walking across the courtyard

entered.detail: large stone sphinx statues flanking the entrance to the avenue
pair of tall dark obelisks marking the ceremonial avenue entrance
wooden structures with hanging white banners spanning the avenue
golden bowls and urns placed along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright open courtyard filled with palm trees in large decorated planters. The space is scattered with flower petals and ceremonial rugs. In the distance, stone sphinx statues and tall black obelisks mark the entrance to a grand ceremonial avenue, while golden urns and offerings line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial avenue with sphinx-lined processional way

events.description: enters the main ceremonial avenue flanked by sphinx statues and obelisks

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the grand avenue, passing between ancient sphinx statues and under ceremonial banners

notable_agents.action: child running ahead down the avenue away from the camera

entered.detail: natural rock outcroppings and desert terrain beyond the avenue walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a grand ceremonial avenue lined with massive stone sphinx statues on both sides. Tall black obelisks rise in the distance, and wooden structures with hanging white banners span the width of the avenue. The environment opens up to desert rock formations beyond the temple walls, with scattered groups of people walking along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area along the ceremonial avenue

events.description: market stalls and merchant goods appear along the left side of the avenue

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue past market stalls and merchants, approaching more densely populated areas

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside goods display watching the character pass

entered.detail: wooden stalls with fabric awnings displaying goods and merchandise
tables and baskets with various goods for sale

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the ceremonial avenue where wooden market stalls now line the left side, displaying merchant goods under fabric awnings. The sphinx statues and obelisks continue into the distance, while more pedestrians and merchants populate the area, creating a bustling atmosphere along the ancient processional way.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, torch-lit depths of a sacred temple interior into a sprawling, sun-drenched ceremonial avenue. It begins amidst massive painted lotus columns and hieroglyphic walls, gliding past a reflecting pool and bronze braziers that cast a warm glow over marble floors scattered with petals. As the character moves toward the exit, the scene shifts through a semi-covered corridor where linen canopies and patterned rugs lead the way, and the artificial light gradually gives way to natural sunlight. The camera then emerges into a bright open courtyard filled with palm trees and golden urns before expanding onto a grand processional way lined with massive stone sphinxes and towering black obelisks. Finally, the environment opens further to reveal distant desert rock formations as the path transforms into a bustling thoroughfare populated by pedestrians and merchant stalls under fabric awnings.
